hero.description: Web · Mobile · Digital Solutions — crafted by two software engineers who care about the details.

about.subtitle: Who we are
about.description: We're two software engineering students obsessed with crafting fast, beautiful, and reliable digital solutions. From early-stage concepts to fully-shipped products, we partner with founders, students, and small teams to bring ideas to life.

founder1.bio: Builds robust web platforms end-to-end — from API to pixel.

founder2.bio: Crafts polished mobile experiences with care for every detail.
